phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as cabines de duche?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: Shower facilities are positioned near the main pedestrian walkway for easy access.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Cabines de Duche.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the shower cabins.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the shower cabins.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Cabines de Duche.

phrases.text_local: Você conhece algum restaurante típico aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH koo-NYEH-sih ahl-GOONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Pergunte no Quiosque da Praia, o funcionário pode recomendar um restaurante típico.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH, AW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the beach kiosk, the employee can recommend a typical restaurant.

responses.english: Ask at the beach kiosk, the employee can recommend a typical restaurant.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH, AW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo.
responses.french: Pergunte no Quiosque da Praia, o funcionário pode recomendar um restaurante típico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque da praia exatamente?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FI-ka oo kee-OS-kee dah PRAH-ee-ah-zeh-zah-tah-MEN-tee
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to it as 'Quiosque da Praia', usually found near the main access path.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao passeio marítimo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW puh-SAYOO muh-REE-tee-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's next to the promenade.

responses.english: Good morning, it's next to the promenade.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW puh-SAYOO muh-REE-tee-moo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto ao passeio marítimo.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Posto de Primeiros Socorros?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH pree-MAY-roosh soo-KOH-roosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Primeiros Socorros.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH pree-MAY-roosh soo-KOH-roosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the First Aid Post.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the First Aid Post.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH pree-MAY-roosh soo-KOH-roosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Posto de Primeiros Socorros.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar cadeiras de praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR kuh-DAY-ruhsh DIH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte no quiosque da praia ou a um funcionário do quiosque.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO KEEOHSH-kih.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the beach kiosk or a kiosk employee.

responses.english: Ask at the beach kiosk or a kiosk employee.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO KEEOHSH-kih.
responses.french: Pergunte no quiosque da praia ou a um funcionário do quiosque.

phrases.text_local: Sabe dizer onde fica o quiosque da praia?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bih dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The kiosk serves refreshments and is a common landmark for visitors.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Quiosque da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Beach Kiosk.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Beach Kiosk.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Quiosque da Praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the grassy area is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde está a zona de relvado?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH ZOH-nuh DIH rehl-VAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The grassy zone is maintained for sunbathing and is clearly marked by local signage.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Zona de Relvado.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH rehl-VAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the grassy area.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the grassy area.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH rehl-VAH-doo.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Zona de Relvado.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the first aid station?
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o posto de primeiros socorros?
phrases.cultural_note: First aid posts are staffed during peak hours and positioned near main facilities.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está ao lado das cabines de duche.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH OW LAH-doo DUHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's beside the shower cabins.

responses.english: Good morning, it's beside the shower cabins.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH OW LAH-doo DUHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
responses.french: Bom dia, está ao lado das cabines de duche.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar cadeiras de praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR kuh-DAY-ruhsh DIH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao Quiosque da Praia para alugar cadeiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH PUH-ruh uh-loo-GAHR kuh-DAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Beach Kiosk to rent chairs.

responses.english: Go to the Beach Kiosk to rent chairs.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH PUH-ruh uh-loo-GAHR kuh-DAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao Quiosque da Praia para alugar cadeiras.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as cabines de duche?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as cabines de duche.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the shower cabins.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the shower cabins.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as cabines de duche.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a zona de relvado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ZOH-nuh DIH rehl-VAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The grassy area provides shaded seating and is maintained weekly during summer.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Zona de Relvado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH rehl-VAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Grassy Area.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Grassy Area.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH rehl-VAH-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Zona de Relvado.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as cabines de duche?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: Shower cabins are near the grassy zone for bathers' convenience.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Cabines de Duche.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Shower Cabins.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Shower Cabins.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Cabines de Duche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque da praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The kiosk is a fixed point on the promenade, easy to spot.
